title: Notifications - Update failed OFF
scenario: No failure notification shown when device is turned off during DFU with Device Software Update notification disabled in App Settings
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Go to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected that has a lower firmware version than the current server version.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
4. Verify that the 'Device Software Update' notification toggle is set to OFF.
5. Return to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
6. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) process (e.g., via Device Settings → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update).
7. During the first 20% of the firmware update progress, press the Home button or recent apps button to put the Poly Studio Mobile app into the background.
8. While the app is in the background, press and hold the Power button on the Poly device to turn it off.
9. Wait for the update to fail (the device is now off and the update cannot complete).
10. Bring the Poly Studio Mobile app back to the foreground.
11. Observe whether any notification appears regarding the update failure.
expected: No notification pops up upon update failure because the 'Device Software Update' notification is turned OFF.
